name: search
description: Search for stops and places in Norway using Entur's geocoder. Use this to find stop IDs (e.g., NSR:StopPlace:59872 for Oslo S) or place names for use with other commands. Returns matching stops with their IDs, names, and coordinates.

query.description: Search query (stop name, place name, or address)

name: trip
description: Plan a public transit journey between two places in Norway. Use this for trip planning with optional departure/arrival time and transport mode filters. For departure boards, use departures instead. For stop details, use stop instead.

from_place.description: Origin place name or stop ID

to.description: Destination place name or stop ID

time.description: Departure or arrival time in ISO format (e.g., 2025-03-01T08:00:00). Required if arrive is set.

arrive.description: If true, interpret time as arrival time instead of departure time

modes.description: Comma-separated list of transport modes to include: bus, rail, tram, metro, water, air, coach

name: departures
description: Get real-time departure board for a specific stop. Use this to check upcoming departures from a stop. Returns departure times, lines, destinations, and real-time delay information. For trip planning, use trip instead. For stop details (platforms, quays), use stop instead.

stop_id.description: Stop ID (e.g., NSR:StopPlace:59872 for Oslo S). Use search to find stop IDs.

limit.description: Maximum number of departures to return

name: stop
description: Get detailed information about a stop including quays, platforms, and nearby places. Use this to find platform information or understand stop layout. For departure times, use departures instead. For trip planning, use trip instead.

stop_id.description: Stop ID (e.g., NSR:StopPlace:59872 for Oslo S). Use search to find stop IDs.
